---
title: "Photography"
---

<div class="tc-page-hero">
<span class="tc-eyebrow">Celotta Photos</span>
<div class="tc-page-title">Portrait Photography</div>
<p class="tc-page-sub">Natural light. Authentic moments. I've been shooting portraits since 2023 with a documentary-influenced eye — finding the real expression between the posed ones.</p>
</div>

<div class="tc-section">
<span class="tc-eyebrow">Gallery</span>
<div class="tc-section-title">Recent Work</div>
<hr class="tc-rule">

<!-- 
  TO ADD YOUR PHOTOS:
  Replace each <div class="tc-photo-placeholder"> block with:
  
  <div class="tc-photo-item">
    <img src="photos/your-image.jpg" alt="Description of photo">
    <div class="tc-photo-caption">Session Title · Location</div>
  </div>
  
  Store your photos in a /photos/ folder next to this file.
  Varying portrait/landscape orientations creates a beautiful masonry effect.
-->

<div class="tc-photo-grid">
  <div class="tc-photo-item">
    <div class="tc-photo-placeholder" style="min-height: 320px;">Add portrait photo</div>
    <div class="tc-photo-caption">Session · Location</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-photo-item">
    <div class="tc-photo-placeholder" style="min-height: 240px;">Add landscape photo</div>
    <div class="tc-photo-caption">Session · Location</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-photo-item">
    <div class="tc-photo-placeholder" style="min-height: 280px;">Add portrait photo</div>
    <div class="tc-photo-caption">Session · Location</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-photo-item">
    <div class="tc-photo-placeholder" style="min-height: 200px;">Add square photo</div>
    <div class="tc-photo-caption">Session · Location</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-photo-item">
    <div class="tc-photo-placeholder" style="min-height: 350px;">Add portrait photo</div>
    <div class="tc-photo-caption">Session · Location</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-photo-item">
    <div class="tc-photo-placeholder" style="min-height: 260px;">Add landscape photo</div>
    <div class="tc-photo-caption">Session · Location</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-photo-item">
    <div class="tc-photo-placeholder" style="min-height: 290px;">Add portrait photo</div>
    <div class="tc-photo-caption">Session · Location</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-photo-item">
    <div class="tc-photo-placeholder" style="min-height: 220px;">Add landscape photo</div>
    <div class="tc-photo-caption">Session · Location</div>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-photo-item">
    <div class="tc-photo-placeholder" style="min-height: 300px;">Add portrait photo</div>
    <div class="tc-photo-caption">Session · Location</div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="tc-section">
<span class="tc-eyebrow">The Approach</span>
<div class="tc-section-title">How I shoot</div>
<hr class="tc-rule">

<div class="tc-audience-grid">
  <div class="tc-audience-card">
    <div class="tc-card-icon">☀️</div>
    <div class="tc-card-audience">Style</div>
    <div class="tc-card-title">Natural Light First</div>
    <p class="tc-card-desc">Golden hour, open shade, window light. I work with the environment rather than against it — the world has better lighting than most studios.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-audience-card">
    <div class="tc-card-icon">🎞️</div>
    <div class="tc-card-audience">Philosophy</div>
    <div class="tc-card-title">Documentary Eye</div>
    <p class="tc-card-desc">The best portraits happen between poses. I keep my camera ready for the unguarded moments — the laugh, the glance away, the quiet exhale.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-audience-card">
    <div class="tc-card-icon">🗺️</div>
    <div class="tc-card-audience">Location</div>
    <div class="tc-card-title">Portland & Twin Cities</div>
    <p class="tc-card-desc">Based in Portland, OR during the school year — Minneapolis / St. Paul in summers. Happy to travel for the right session.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="tc-audience-card">
    <div class="tc-card-icon">📬</div>
    <div class="tc-card-audience">Booking</div>
    <div class="tc-card-title">Let's Work Together</div>
    <p class="tc-card-desc">Portraits, events, headshots, outdoor sessions. Reach out via email and we'll figure out the details — no complicated booking forms.</p>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<div style="padding: 1rem 0 2.5rem;">
  <a href="mailto:tylercelotta@reed.edu" class="tc-cta-link tc-cta-filled">Book a Session →</a>
  <a href="index.qmd" class="tc-cta-link">← Back Home</a>
</div>
